title: PointWorld
why_it_matters: Single pretrained 3D world model with MPC that works from one in-the-wild RGB-D capture and no post-training

title: Scaling World Model for Hierarchical Manipulation Policies
why_it_matters: Uses a high-level world model to generate visual subgoals for a low-level VLA and reports large OOD gains

title: Goal-VLA
why_it_matters: Generates goal images and object-centric targets instead of predicting actions in one shot

title: Act2Goal
why_it_matters: Goal-conditioned visual world model with multi-scale temporal control and strong zero-shot OOD gains

title: Dream to Manipulate
why_it_matters: Builds a digital twin style world model and augments demonstrations to improve generalization from very little data

title: pi*0.6: A VLA That Learns from Experience
why_it_matters: Not a world model paper but a major recent VLA plus RL paper on improving real-world robustness from experience

title: GWM
why_it_matters: 3D Gaussian future-state prediction used as representation learning and as a neural simulator for policy training

title: Visuo-Tactile World Models
why_it_matters: Tactile-grounded world model for contact-rich tasks with zero-shot real-robot improvements

title: OmniVTA
why_it_matters: Large visuo-tactile world-model system with reflexive tactile control

title: iMoWM
why_it_matters: Autoregressive RGB-depth-mask world model that supports model-based RL and imitation learning

title: DayDreamer
why_it_matters: Foundational world-model RL baseline for real robots and sparse rewards

title: STORM and other search-time world-model planners
why_it_matters: Promising planning-in-imagination direction but not yet central to this internship
